comments.author: @kutonggubat8297
comments.text: I worked nearly 20 years in Saudi Arabia and dearly missed it. Beautiful Al Khobar, the modernity of Riyadh and Jeddah is amazing.  The peaceful and quiet loving people, their clothes, foods, music and dances really amazed me. Unforgettable indeed. Missed Saudi so much, especially Al-Khobar❤

replies.text: It's wonderful to hear you have such fond memories of your time in Saudi Arabia, especially Al Khobar. Thanks for sharing your experience!

comments.author: @RealTravelonEarth
comments.text: If you want the real soul of the country, go south to Jazan and Asir. The skyscrapers in Riyadh are cool, but the mountains are where the magic is!

Yang pasti semua Rizqi yang ada di dunia ini,baik ituh berupa kebun ,ternak,keturunan,serta harta dan benda serta kesehatan juga kebaikan ,semuanya ituh berasal dari muara sabdanya Allah SWT: 
قال الله تعالى: اى لكل شيء (من لدنا علما) .
Maka barang siyapa jika tidak bersyukur dan ber terimakasih serta tidak menyembah kepada Allah SWT dan beriman kepada rasulnya yaituh kanjeng nabi Muhammad Saw dan tidak mengimani kitab sucinya yaituh Al-Qur'anul Karim berarti orang tersebut sudah kufur kepada Allah SWT. Aliyas balasannya akan di masukkan ke neraka selamanya .
Pada kalimat min ladunna ILMA/ من لدنا علما

comments.author: @MitchellBrent-o7g

comments.author: @HughesSebastian-d5x
comments.text: The contrast between desert village life and the oil kingdom backdrop is stunning. It really makes you think about what lasts longer than money.

comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text: Thanks for exploring Saudi Arabia with us 🌍 Like, share, and subscribe for more hidden journeys. 👉 Where should we go next?

comments.author: @XPlanet-TV
comments.text: I always thought Saudi Arabia was just deserts and ultra-modern cities. This video revealed a completely different side with its traditional villages, welcoming people, and vibrant culture. The cinematography is absolutely stunning—it truly feels like traveling there!

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thank you so much for your kind words, I’m thrilled you enjoyed discovering this side of the country! ✨

comments.text: The desert landscapes, rocky mountains, and ancient villages are truly captivating.
